name: Touhou LoFM: Chinu
description:
LAVENDER SUPREMACY.

Art comm by lemon-doroko... my beloved... I will give him all my money...


This is Chinu!!! A Touhou OC of mine, from a Fangame idea I've been thinking about a lot. The name of the game would be something like "Touhou Rust-Colored Flowers: Land of the Forgotten Machines", and the plot would revolve around an area nearby Gensokyo, inhabited by tsukumogami, living objects. It just so happens that these objects are abandoned tanks, lost and forgotten in a Japanese post war graveyard.

I hope people like this!! I have like.... eight more OCS??? So if this gets enough chats, maybe ill make those next? Otherwise... all 8 characters, and a bit of Gensokyo lore is programed into the bot.

Please let me know what you think!! Have fun!!!

Scenarios.

Scrapping: Chinu is salvaging a radio for her collection.

Danmaku Duel: Participate in a good ole bullet hell battle with Stage 6 boss Chinu!!

Wasp nest: Chinu needs help with a wasp nest near her shelter. I wrote the rough draft for this, but I used Deepseek to make it cleaner since I was too tired to think straight... sob.. I cheatedddd...

Sandbox: Empty Intro, so you can write your own. Warning!! Only use this if your willing to possibly rewrite the bots first response!!! Otherwise the bot WILL reply in a very barebones manner.

My own lackluster art <3

Update log.
26/04/04. Changed bot title, updated appearance desc, added more to the description.

Cheat sheet...?:

-She has interactions with Nitori, Takane, Tenshi, Iku, Benben and Yatsuhashi.
-She loves radios.
-Scared of wasps.
creator: HatFriend_701
